environment._NOTE_CONTEXT_BUDGET: Tool-schema wire payload: ~1–3K tokens (varies by .utcp_config.json declared tool surface).
environment._NOTE_TOTAL_MCP_BUDGET: Project-wide MCP context-token rollup (rough, wire-payload estimates at ~3.5 chars/token): mk-spec-memory ~7–8K + mk_code_index ~2.2K + mk_skill_advisor ~2.2K + sequential_thinking ~0.3K + code_mode ~1–3K = ~13–16K tokens total. On a 200K-context model this is ~8–11% of total budget; on 1M-context Opus ~2%. mk-spec-memory remains the dominant single-MCP cost. Methodology: source-byte ÷ 3.5 × wire-compression factor 0.5; full repro in .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/ (or pipe `tools/list` JSON-RPC to each launcher for exact wire bytes).
